title: Creating a Business Case
scenario: Create a prompt that generates a comprehensive business case for a new product launch, including market analysis, financial projections, and a return on investment (ROI) calculation.
constraints: Must include a detailed market analysis
Must include a financial forecast for the first 3 years

evaluationCriteria.description: Is the generated business case accurate and well-supported by data?
Is the market analysis thorough and well-researched?
Are the financial forecasts realistic and well-supported?
